projectDescription: A Windows desktop assistant that combines a floating animated pet with a full task manager, Outlook Classic integration, AI-powered email triage, meeting management, and productivity features like Focus Mode, recurring tasks, and morning briefings.
keyFeatures: Floating animated desktop pet (bunny, frog, panda, cow, cat, dog) that stays always-on-top
Full task manager with categories, subcategories, priority, owner, due dates, and recurrence
Outlook Classic integration via local COM automation — no Microsoft Graph or Azure AD required
AI-powered email triage (Azure OpenAI or OpenAI) with local fallback classifier
Meeting detection with Teams join links, conflict warnings, and staggered reminders
Focus Mode (25, 50, or 90 minutes) silencing all notifications except meetings
Morning briefing and end-of-day closing summary with text-to-speech
Global keyboard shortcuts: Win+Shift+C, Win+Shift+T, Win+Shift+S, Win+Shift+F
Automatic priority escalation: High at 3 days, Urgent at 24 hours, Overdue past due date
Progress view with 7-day completion chart, streak counter, and overload alert
Per-pet visual themes that change the entire UI palette and greeting scene
Day status traffic light: green / amber / red based on pending urgent items
CSV export, full JSON backup, and sensitive-data-free diagnostics export
Electron security hardening: sandbox, CSP, context isolation, validated IPC
publicApiSurface: window.desktop.exportFile(defaultName: string, content: string): Promise<string | null>
window.desktop.setFocus(mode: FocusMode | null, minutes: number): Promise<boolean>
Type: Task — id, title, detail, category, priority, dueAt, status, source, recurrence, owner
Type: Meeting — id, title, startsAt, endsAt, attendees, joinUrl, location, mode
Type: AppSettings — userName, reminderMinutes, autoSyncMinutes, petVariant, aiProvider, ...
Type: AppState — tasks, suggestions, categories, meetings, settings, dismissedSuggestionIds
Type: InboxSuggestion — extends Task (omits status), adds excerpt and needsReview
IPC channel: load-data, save-data, schedule-reminder, cancel-reminder
IPC channel: show-notification, open-external, open-assistant, show-pet
IPC channel: set-focus, get-focus, pet-update, shortcut (event)
